ModMetadata.Name: Storms Aimee Buff
ModMetadata.Author: StormCircuit
ModMetadata.Description: Mod to buff aimee and allow tweaking of her values. Allows tweaking of Aimee's: max speed (buffed from 1.3 to 2.6) storm damage scale (buffed to survive at most 1 storm) mining depth (buffed from 3m to 6m) stuck timer stuck speed search area and repair speed
